seoTitle: Daw Park vs Dawson — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Daw Park and Dawson. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Daw Park vs Dawson: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Daw Park and Dawson.
heading: Daw Park vs Dawson — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Daw Park, South Australia and Dawson, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dawson has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Daw Park (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Daw Park or Dawson safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Daw Park has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Dawson scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Daw Park scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Dawson scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Daw Park or Dawson?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dawson has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
